data.name: winner_from_seed
data.span: int winner_from_seed = (seed_0 + seed_1 * 128 + seed_2 * 16384 + seed_3 * 2097152) % sold_tickets;

functions.name: refund_all

data.then_span:
require(tx.outputs[1].scriptPubKey == byte[](new ScriptPubKeyP2PK(pubkey(owner_02))));
            require(tx.outputs[1].value == ticket_price * (batch_end_02 - batch_end_01));

require(tx.outputs[2].scriptPubKey == byte[](new ScriptPubKeyP2PK(pubkey(owner_03))));
            require(tx.outputs[2].value == ticket_price * (batch_end_03 - batch_end_02));

require(tx.outputs[3].scriptPubKey == byte[](new ScriptPubKeyP2PK(pubkey(owner_04))));
            require(tx.outputs[3].value == ticket_price * (batch_end_04 - batch_end_03));
